ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., xampp, simpleanalysis) */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was recorded */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the event was recorded */,
  "event_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "event_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the event (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "type_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the event type (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the event type (e.g., collision, decay) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the stage belongs to */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage (e.g., Initial, PassGRL, passLArTile) */,
  "stage_description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "stage_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the stage */,
  "stage_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the stage */,
  "stage_status" TEXT /* Status of the stage (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "stage_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_stages_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage the metric belongs to */,
  "events" INTEGER /* Number of events at this stage */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of this stage */,
  "relative_efficiency" REAL /* Relative efficiency of this stage */,
  "metric_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the metric calculation */,
  "metric_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the metric calculation */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_metrics_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES event_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_xampp_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage the metric belongs to */,
  "events_xampp" INTEGER /* Number of xampp events at this stage */,
  "efficiency_xampp" REAL /* Efficiency of this xampp stage */,
  "relative_efficiency_xampp" REAL /* Relative efficiency of this xampp stage */,
  "metric_start_time_xampp" TEXT /* Start time of the xampp metric calculation */,
  "metric_end_time_xampp" TEXT /* End time of the xampp metric calculation */,
  "metric_notes_xampp" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the xampp metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_xampp_metrics_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES event_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_simpleanalysis_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage the metric belongs to */,
  "events_simpleanalysis" INTEGER /* Number of simpleanalysis events at this stage */,
  "efficiency_simpleanalysis" REAL /* Efficiency of this simpleanalysis stage */,
  "relative_efficiency_simpleanalysis" REAL /* Relative efficiency of this simpleanalysis stage */,
  "metric_start_time_simpleanalysis" TEXT /* Start time of the simpleanalysis metric calculation */,
  "metric_end_time_simpleanalysis" TEXT /* End time of the simpleanalysis metric calculation */,
  "metric_notes_simpleanalysis" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the simpleanalysis metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_simpleanalysis_metrics_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES event_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_supervisor" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor (foreign key to users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_supervisor FOREIGN KEY ("user_supervisor") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the event (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader (foreign key to users) */,
  "team_establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., lead, member) */,
  "member_join_date" TEXT /* Date when the member joined the team */,
  "member_leaving_date" TEXT /* Date when the member left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_teams" (
  "event_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-team assignment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team assigned to the event */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was assigned to the team */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the event-team assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_teams_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
